Headline: #73 Armitage Temporary Reroute at Armitage/Sheffield
ShortDescription: #73 Armitage buses are temp. rerouted in both directions via Armitage, Halsted, Fullerton, Sheffield and Armitage due to construction near Armitage/Sheffield.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#73 Armitage buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Armitage, Halsted, Fullerton, Sheffield, then resume their normal route on Armitage.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Armitage/Sheffield.

Headline: Brown Line Service Experiencing Significant Delays Due to Raised Bridge
ShortDescription: Brown Line service is experiencing delays due to a raised bridge at the Chicago River, downtown.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Brown Line service is experiencing delays due to a raised bridge at the Chicago River, downtown.

Some trains may be either held or rerouted before reaching the bridge (in order to maintain service across the remainder of the route). Listen for announcements and check train destination signs when boarding.

We apologize for this temporary inconvenience and appreciate your patience while the Chicago Department of Transportation works to complete the bridge operation. Allow extra travel time

Headline: Midway-bound Orange Line Delays
ShortDescription: Midway-bound Orange Line trains are running w/residual delays due to an earlier delay at Halsted. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Midway-bound Orange Line trains are running w/residual delays due to an earlier delay at Halsted. 

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
